title: RoSE — Romanian SEismic Dataset Toolkit
description: Python toolkit, three published phase pickers (EQT-RoSE, PhaseNet-RoSE, RED-PAN-60s), and the benchmark pipeline that scores them on the RoSE Romanian local-earthquake dataset.

creators.name: Liao, Wu-Yu
creators.affiliation: Department of Earth Sciences, National Cheng-Kung University, Taiwan

references: Mousavi et al. (2020), Earthquake Transformer, Nature Communications 11:3952.
Zhu & Beroza (2019), PhaseNet, Geophysical Journal International 216:261-273.
